flags.description: Enables the compressed protobuf-based alert state storage. Default is enabled.

flags.name: alertingSaveStatePeriodic

flags.description: Use synchronized dispatch timer to minimize duplicate notifications across alertmanager HA pods

flags.name: externalServiceAccounts

flags.name: externalSnapshotsK8SAPIPush
flags.description: When kubernetesSnapshots is enabled, push/delete external snapshots via the K8s API. When off, the K8s snapshots handler falls back to the legacy /api/snapshots endpoint on the external instance.

flags.name: externalSnapshotsSupportLegacyAPI
flags.description: On a SnapshotPublicMode instance with kubernetesSnapshots enabled, keep accepting anonymous /api/snapshots pushes by routing them through CreateDashboardSnapshotPublic instead of the authenticated k8s create endpoint. Default off: the migrated end state rejects anonymous legacy pushes. Turn on as a temporary backward-compat lever while senders migrate to the authenticated k8s API push, then turn off once migration completes. Not compatible with snapshot dual-write Mode5 (k8s-only storage), where the k8s create API is mandatory.

flags.name: panelStyleActions
flags.description: Enable style actions (copy/paste) in the panel editor

flags.name: panelTimeSettings
flags.description: Enables a new panel time settings drawer

flags.name: panelTitleSearch
flags.description: Search for dashboards using panel title

flags.name: pdfTables
flags.description: Enables generating table data as PDF in reporting

flags.name: perPanelFiltering
flags.description: Enables filtering by grouping labels on the panel level through legend or tooltip

flags.name: perPanelNonApplicableDrilldowns
flags.description: Enables viewing non-applicable drilldowns on a panel level

flags.name: pieChartGradientColorScheme
flags.description: Enable gradient color scheme option for the pie chart panel

flags.name: playlistsRBAC
flags.description: Enables RBAC for playlists

flags.name: playlistsReconciler
flags.description: Enables experimental reconciler for playlists

flags.name: pluginContainers
flags.description: Enables running plugins in containers

flags.name: pluginInsights
flags.description: Show insights for plugins in the plugin details page

flags.name: pluginInstallAPISync
flags.description: Enable syncing plugin installations to the installs API

flags.name: pluginProxyPreserveTrailingSlash
flags.description: Preserve plugin proxy trailing slash.

flags.name: plugins.initDataSourcesAsync
flags.description: Initializes data source instance settings asynchronously from the API instead of synchronously from boot data

flags.name: plugins.marketplaceLicensing
flags.description: Enables marketplace plugin licensing

flags.name: plugins.useMTPlugins
flags.description: Enables plugins decoupling from bootdata

flags.name: plugins.useMTPluginSettings
flags.description: Enables plugins setting from new apis

flags.name: pluginsAutoUpdate
flags.description: Enables auto-updating of users installed plugins

flags.name: pluginsSriChecks
flags.description: Enables SRI checks for plugin assets

flags.name: pluginStoreServiceLoading
flags.description: Load plugins on store service startup instead of wire provider, and call RegisterFixedRoles after all plugins are loaded

flags.name: preferences.rerouteLegacyAPIs
flags.description: Use K8s client implementation for legacy preferences API

flags.name: preferLibraryPanelTitle
flags.description: Prefer library panel title over viz panel title.

flags.name: preserveDashboardStateWhenNavigating
flags.description: Enables possibility to preserve dashboard variables and time range when navigating between dashboards

flags.name: profilesExemplars
flags.description: Enables profiles exemplars support in profiles drilldown

flags.name: profilesHeatmap
flags.description: Enables heatmap visualization support for Pyroscope profiles

flags.name: prometheusAzureOverrideAudience
flags.description: Deprecated. Allow override default AAD audience for Azure Prometheus endpoint. Enabled by default. This feature should no longer be used and will be removed in the future.

flags.name: prometheusSpecialCharsInLabelValues
flags.description: Adds support for quotes and special characters in label values for Prometheus queries

flags.name: prometheusTypeMigration
flags.description: Checks for deprecated Prometheus authentication methods (SigV4 and Azure), installs the relevant data source, and migrates the Prometheus data sources

flags.name: provisioning
flags.description: Enables Git Sync and as-code provisioning for Grafana resources

flags.name: provisioning.gitConventions
flags.description: Enable configurable commit message, branch name, and pull request title conventions for Git Sync

flags.name: provisioning.readmes
flags.description: Render the README.md of a Git Sync provisioned folder inline below its dashboards list

flags.name: provisioningExport
flags.description: Enable export functionality for provisioned resources

flags.name: provisioningFolderMetadata
flags.description: Allow setting folder metadata for provisioned folders

flags.name: publicDashboardsEmailSharing
flags.description: Enables public dashboard sharing to be restricted to only allowed emails

flags.name: pyroscopeUTF8LabelNames
flags.description: Enables support for UTF-8 label names in Pyroscope label selectors

flags.name: querycaching.enableConnectionsClient
flags.description: Use connections client instead of storage to resolve datasource plugin ID in query caching

flags.name: querycaching.redirectToK8SApi
flags.description: Redirect caching service cache config reads from legacy storage to K8s API

flags.name: querycaching.useInQueryService
flags.description: Enables the query service to do query caching

flags.name: queryEditorNext
flags.description: Enables next generation query editor experience

flags.name: queryFetchConfigFromSettingsService
flags.description: Enables the query service to fetch the configuration from the settings service

flags.name: queryHistory.localOnly
flags.description: Store query history in browser IndexedDB instead of server-side

flags.name: queryHistory.recentQueriesUI
flags.description: Replace the Query History drawer with a new Recent Queries modal UI

flags.name: queryLibrary
flags.description: Enables Saved queries (query library) feature

flags.name: queryService
flags.description: Register /apis/query.grafana.app/ -- will eventually replace /api/ds/query

flags.name: queryServiceFromUI
flags.description: Routes requests to the new query service

flags.name: queryServiceRewrite
flags.description: Rewrite requests targeting /ds/query to the query service

flags.name: queryServiceWithConnections
flags.description: Adds datasource connections to the query service

flags.name: queryWithAssistant
flags.description: Enables the Query with Assistant button in the query editor

flags.name: react19
flags.description: Whether to use the new React 19 runtime

flags.name: recentlyViewedDashboards
flags.description: Enables recently viewed dashboards section in the browsing dashboard page

flags.name: refreshTokenRequired
flags.description: Require that refresh tokens are present in oauth tokens.

flags.name: reloadDashboardsOnParamsChange
flags.description: Enables reload of dashboards on scopes, time range and variables changes

flags.name: rememberUserOrgForSso
flags.description: Remember the last viewed organization for users using SSO

flags.name: renderAuthJWT
flags.description: Uses JWT-based auth for rendering instead of relying on remote cache

flags.name: reporting.anyPageReporting
flags.description: Enables reporting for any page in Grafana

flags.name: reporting.pdfTablesFrontend
flags.description: Enables frontend-rendered table appendix pages in PDF reports

flags.name: reportingFooterSettings
flags.description: Enables the configurable footer settings for PDF reports

flags.name: reportingHeaderSettings
flags.description: Enables configuration of PDF report settings

flags.name: reportingV2Layouts
flags.description: Enable v2 dashboard layout support in reports (auto-grid, tabs, rows)

flags.name: reportRenderBinding
flags.description: Enables render binding support for report rendering

flags.name: restrictedPluginApis
flags.description: Enables sharing a list of APIs with a list of plugins

flags.name: rolePickerDrawer
flags.description: Enables the new role picker drawer design

flags.name: rudderstackUpgrade
flags.description: Enables the new version of rudderstack

flags.name: savedQueriesRBAC
flags.description: Enables Saved queries (query library) RBAC permissions

flags.name: scopeApi
flags.description: In-development feature flag for the scope api using the app platform.

flags.name: scopeFilters
flags.description: Enables the use of scope filters in Grafana

flags.name: scopeSearchAllLevels
flags.description: Enable scope search to include all levels of the scope node tree

flags.name: secretsKeeperUI
flags.description: Enable the Secrets Keeper management UI for configuring external secret storage

flags.name: secretsManagementAppPlatformAwsKeeper
flags.description: Enables the creation of keepers that manage secrets stored on AWS secrets manager

flags.name: secretsManagementAppPlatformUI
flags.description: Enable the secrets management app platform UI

flags.name: smoothingTransformation
flags.description: Enables the ASAP smoothing transformation for time series data

flags.name: splashScreen
flags.description: Enables the splash screen modal for introducing new Grafana features on first session

flags.name: splunk.useLegacyResultsApi
flags.description: Makes the Splunk data source use the deprecated REST API v1 search result endpoints instead of v2

flags.name: sqlExpressions
flags.description: Enables SQL Expressions, which can execute SQL queries against data source results.

flags.name: sqlExpressionsCodeMirror
flags.description: Enables CodeMirror editor for SQL Expressions

flags.name: sqlExpressionsColumnAutoComplete
flags.description: Enables column autocomplete for SQL Expressions

flags.name: sseExpressionErrorIsolation
flags.description: Isolate expression build errors to the broken expression's refID instead of failing the entire pipeline

flags.name: sseGroupByDatasource
flags.description: Send query to the same datasource in a single request when using server side expressions. The `cloudWatchBatchQueries` feature toggle should be enabled if this used with CloudWatch.

flags.name: starsFromAPIServer
flags.description: populate star status from apiserver

flags.name: stateTimeline.nameAboveBars
flags.description: Enables option to position series names above bars in the state timeline panel

flags.name: streamingForwardTeamHeadersTempo
flags.description: Enables forwarding team headers from tempo for streaming requests with LBAC rules

flags.name: suggestedDashboards
flags.description: Displays datasource provisioned and community dashboards in dashboard empty page, only when coming from datasource configuration page

flags.name: suggestedDashboardsAssistantButton
flags.description: Enables the 'Customize with Assistant' button on suggested dashboard cards

flags.name: table.protoRowParser
flags.description: Enables a new internal parser for table panel which doesn't rely on constructing a dynamic function and works in more browser environments.

flags.name: table.refactorNested
flags.description: Enables the refactored TableNG nested-table implementation

flags.name: tableSharedCrosshair
flags.description: Enables shared crosshair in table panel

flags.name: teamFolders
flags.description: Enables team folders functionality

flags.name: teamHttpHeadersFromAppPlatform
flags.description: Use the Kubernetes TeamLBACRule API for team HTTP headers on datasource query requests

flags.name: teamHttpHeadersTempo
flags.description: Enables LBAC for datasources for Tempo to apply LBAC filtering of traces to the client requests for users in teams

flags.name: teamLBACApiReadFromAppPlatform
flags.description: Use the Kubernetes TeamLBACRule API for reading team LBAC rules in the legacy API server

flags.name: teamLBACApiWriteFromAppPlatform
flags.description: Use the Kubernetes TeamLBACRule API for writing team LBAC rules in the legacy API server

flags.name: tempoAlerting
flags.description: Enables creating alerts from Tempo data source

flags.name: timeComparison
flags.description: Enables time comparison option in supported panels

flags.name: timeRangeProvider
flags.description: Enables time pickers sync

flags.name: tracesDrilldownTimeSeeker
flags.description: Enables the time seeker in traces drilldown

flags.name: transformationsEmptyPlaceholder
flags.description: Show transformation quick-start cards in empty transformations state

flags.name: ttlPluginInstanceManager
flags.description: Enable TTL plugin instance manager

flags.name: unifiedNavbars
flags.description: Enables unified navbars

flags.name: unlimitedLayoutsNesting
flags.description: Enables unlimited dashboard panel grouping

flags.name: useKubernetesShortURLsAPI
flags.description: Routes short URL requests from /api to the /apis endpoint in the frontend. Depends on kubernetesShortURLs

flags.name: useMultipleScopeNodesEndpoint
flags.description: Makes the frontend use the 'names' param for fetching multiple scope nodes at once

flags.name: useNewAPIsForDatasourceCRUD
flags.description: Use the new datasource API groups for datasource CRUD requests

flags.name: useScopeSingleNodeEndpoint
flags.description: Use the single node endpoint for the scope api. This is used to fetch the scope parent node.

flags.name: useScopesNavigationEndpoint
flags.description: Use the scopes navigation endpoint instead of the dashboardbindings endpoint

flags.name: useSessionStorageForRedirection
flags.description: Use session storage for handling the redirection after login

flags.name: vizActionsAuth
flags.description: Allows authenticated API calls in actions

flags.name: vizLegendFacetedFilter
flags.description: Enable faceted labels filter for series visibility in the legend

flags.name: vizPresets
flags.description: Enable visualization presets

flags.name: yAxisTickControl
flags.description: Enables fine-grained Y-axis tick options beyond the auto-ticks

flags.name: zanzana
flags.description: Use openFGA as authorization engine.

flags.name: zanzanaMergeUserPermissions
flags.description: Merge Zanzana permissions into legacy RBAC for access-control API endpoints.

flags.name: zanzanaNoLegacyClient
flags.description: Use openFGA as main authorization engine and disable legacy RBAC clietn.
